name: Pumpkin Pecan Pie Bars
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large mixing bowl, beat margarine and brown sugar until fluffy. Add flour, oats, baking powder, and 1 teaspoon salt. Mix until crumbly. Reserve half of the flour mixture. Press remaining into bottom of a 15x10 inch jellyroll pan. Bake for 20 minutes. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine pumpkin puree, sweetened condensed milk, eggs, pumpkin pie spice, vanilla, and 1 teaspoon salt. Spread over baked crust. In a small bowl, combine reserved half cup flour mixture with pecans. Sprinkle over pumpkin mixture. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until set. Cool. Cut into bars. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar if desired. Store covered in refrigerator.
